DOWNFALL-ENTANGLED_POWER.title: Entangled
DOWNFALL-ENTANGLED_POWER.description: You cannot play Attacks this turn.
DOWNFALL-ENTANGLED_POWER.smartDescriptio: You cannot play Attacks this turn.
DOWNFALL-METALLICIZE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-METALLICIZE_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALL-METALLICIZE_POWER.title: Metallicize
DOWNFALL-PLATED_ARMOR_POWER.title: Plated Armor
DOWNFALL-PLATED_ARMOR_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold]. Receiving unblocked attack damage reduces [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
DOWNFALL-PLATED_ARMOR_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Receiving unblocked attack damage reduces [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
DOWNFALL-STUNNED_POWER.title: Stunned
DOWNFALL-STUNNED_POWER.description: You can't play cards, draw cards or gain Energy this turn.
DOWNFALL-STUNNED_POWER.smartDescription: You can't play cards, draw cards or gain Energy this turn.
DOWNFALL-NEXT_TURN_STUNNED_POWER.title: Next Turn Stunned
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_UP_POWER.de: Gain [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_UP_POWER.sm: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_DOWN_POWER.d: Lose [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_DOWN_POWER.s: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_UP_POWER.des: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_UP_POWER.sma: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.title: Thorns Down
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.descript: Gain [gold]Thorns[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.smartDes: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] until the end of this turn.
DOWNFALL-TEMP_HP_POWER.title: Temp HP
DOWNFALL-TEMP_HP_POWER.description: Until end of combat, prevents damage to HP.
DOWNFALL-TEMP_HP_POWER.smartDescription: Until end of combat, prevents [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to HP.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_BURN_POWER.title: Soulburn
DOWNFALL-SOUL_BURN_POWER.description: In [blue]3[/blue] turns, this enemy loses HP at the start of Enemy's turn, then [gold]Soulburn[/gold] is removed.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_BURN_POWER.smartDescriptio: In [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}, this enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP at the start of Enemy's turn, then [gold]Soulburn[/gold] is removed.
DOWNFALL-ENERGIZED_POWER.title: Energized
DOWNFALL-ENERGIZED_POWER.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of each turn.
DOWNFALL-ENERGIZED_POWER.smartDescriptio: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
DOWNFALL-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Gaining Card
DOWNFALL-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your next turn, add a saved card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DOWNFALL-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your next turn, add [gold]{card}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DOWNFALL-STRENGTH_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Next Turn Strength
